en.atmosphere: Deep Chiba mountains. Kururi line single-track local train territory. 101-min commute. Forest dominates. Zero food/nightlife data.
en.landmarks: Elevated at 97m. Massive green zone nearby (100M sqm forest). Nature lovers only. Almost no urban landmarks.
en.food: Essentially zero data. Scrapers found nothing. Bring a bento.
en.nightlife: Minimal. Last train 21:14 (early). Pure car-dependent village.
